name: Rubrik, Inc.
summary: PART I We are on a mission to secure and accelerate the worlds AI transformation. Organizations are facing new challenges. Cyberattacks are inevitable. Prevention and detection are not enough. Realizing that cyberattacks ultimately target data, we created Zero Trust Data Security to deliver cyber resilience so that organizations can secure their data across the cloud and recover from cyberattacks. As enterprises embrace the forthcoming AI transformation, they are grappling with a threat landscap...
